item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
no need to brag
sadly
nonstop bangers
crazy exchange rate i believe
there goes my friday night plans
or start worrying about something and not fall back asleep
i guess
it's important
wait what
Jurassic Park. Doubtfire. Dazed & Confused. hard to omit Tombstone and a bunch of the rest
RIP Hank & Gary
they might have non catastrophic failures
hell yeah
i swear by this stuff
huh?
everyone loves squarrel
that's my set... have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The fascist Elon "Mushk for brains" is probably destroying the ozone layer
item.description: Turns out mega constellations of short lived satellites is a bad thing. It truly hurts, as I work in this business. Nothing compared to starlink, but we are still a part of it. One of our greatest feats was repairing the ozone layer. Please read: https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2024GL109280
item.dc:creator: oxyacetyleneballoon

item.title: What Happened Today #40
item.description: DON'T LOOK AWAY. The U.S. is shutting down civil rights offices, punishing law firms, gutting climate rules, and forcing Canadians to register like it’s 1925. The last Guantánamo detainees? Shipped to Louisiana. Trump just pardoned a convicted lawmaker 15 days into his sentence. The fight isn’t just in DC. Local organizing is exploding. A NY Indivisible chapter saw 3x its expected turnout this week—a glimpse of the power fueling resistance. Read about that and more in Micah Sifry’s The Defiance This Time. Amplify this. Share with friends, family, and anyone ready to fight back. The more who know, the stronger we are. #Resistance2025 #StayInformed #GovBriefToday LINKS 1. https://www.propublica.org/article/education-department-civil-rights-division-eroded-by-massive-layoffs 2. https://www.npr.org/2025/03/12/g-s1-53422/judge-blocks-trump-law-firm 3. https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/national-international/federal-student-loan-website-down-education-department-layoffs/3696259/ 4. https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/live-updates/trump-2nd-term-live-updates-trump-defends-tariff?id=119625202&entryId=119721718 5. https://www.nbcnews.com/science/environment/epa-rollback-environmental-regulations-zeldin-rcna196112 6. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn892j6wpg8o 7. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/12/arts/national-endowment-humanities-trump-shelly-lowe.html 8. https://apnews.com/article/trump-eu-tariffs-countermeasures-806a3b9bcc9cd4e45817e672d95f0070 9. https://www.voanews.com/a/us-clears-out-remaining-migrants-from-guantanamo-bay/8008349.html 10. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/12/nyc-migrant-shelter-doj 11. https://www.ketk.com/news/national/ap-federal-court-hearing-set-in-columbia-students-detainment-over-pro-palestinian-protests/ 12. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/12/trump-pardon-tennessee-brian-kelsey-prison-campaign-doj.html 13. https://thehill.com/homenews/5192090-judge-finds-trump-unlawfully-fired-head-of-federal-employee-labor-board/ 14. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/12/judge-military-trump-transgender-ban/82278402007/ 15. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/12/trump-canada-visitors-immigration-authorities FIGHTING BACK - https://substack.com/home/post/p-158882604 ARCHIVE & FREE SUBSCRIPTION - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Sigh
item.description: https://www.ctvnews.ca/canada/article/us-hardens-rules-for-visiting-canadians/ I usually go to the US 20+ times a year for work and pleasure. This year I'll be going 3 times for work. Thats it. I won't be spending my money on southern beach vacations. I won't be making my bi monthly trip to Montana to go camping. I won't be renewing my reservation for a month at the cottage in Montana either. I am one person who spends probably $20k a year in the US on personal trips and $30-40k on work trips. Now think about that for the masses of Canadians who are no longer going to spend in the US. I'll miss you, the USA, but I'll be spending my money in Central America now. European flights have gone down in cost as well. The time to fight back is now. Step us USA citizens and stop this madness.
item.dc:creator: veesee
